description: Greek-substrate anchor lens. Pivots English 'beginning' onto ἀρχή's logos.genesis.origin atom via the grc cognition pack's field hook. Renders surface as English compound 'generative-origin'. Fills the temporal/origination pole of the anchor-lens space — distinct from epistemic (grc_logos_v1), vitality (grc_zoe_v1), and truth (grc_aletheia_v1) lenses. Completes the grc quad. Atom confirmed in grc_logos_cognition_v1 lexicon (grc-core-cog-005). See ADR-0073c.
